description: [``botocore``] Added DISABLE IN PROGRESS and DISABLE FAILED Portal statuses.
[``botocore``] This release adds support for creating SLOs on RUM appMonitors, Synthetics canaries and services.
[``botocore``] Update endpoint-rules client to latest version
[``botocore``] The Variable Payments APIs enable AWS Marketplace Sellers to perform manage their payment requests (send, get, list, cancel).
[``botocore``] Add support for Mu-law and A-law codecs for output format
[``botocore``] GA release of AccountCustomizations, used to manage account color, visible services, and visible regions settings in the AWS Management Console.
